verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Oh God You are my God And I will ever praise You :/ I will seek You in the morning And I will learn to walk in Your ways And step by step You'll lead me And I will follow You all of my days

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes the night was beautiful Sometimes the sky was so far away Sometimes it seemed too steep So close you could touch it But your heart would break Sometimes the morning came too soon Sometimes the day could be so hard There was so much work left to do But so much you'd already done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes I think of Abraham How one star he saw had been lit for him He was a stranger in this land And I am that no less than he And on this road to righteousness Sometimes the climb can be steep I may falter in my steps But never beyond reach
